title: AI learning analytics planning grant
text: A planning grant invites teams to prototype AI-supported learning analytics dashboards for advising and curriculum improvement.

nlp.summary: Funding opportunity for AI-supported learning analytics dashboards with advising and curriculum use cases.
nlp.review_reason: High relevance to dashboard funding and implementation planning.

title: NLP dashboards for student feedback triage
text: The paper describes a pipeline that collects open-ended course feedback, extracts themes, estimates urgency, and routes comments to a review queue.

nlp.summary: Research paper showing how NLP can turn open-ended course feedback into themes, urgency scores, and a review workflow.
nlp.review_reason: Useful methodological benchmark, but not an immediate action item.

title: Data governance update for automated text analysis
text: A new guidance memo asks teams to document source permissions, data retention, model prompts, and human review rules before deploying automated text analysis dashboards.

nlp.summary: Policy memo requiring documentation of source permissions, retention, prompts, and human review for text-analysis dashboards.
nlp.review_reason: Directly affects dashboard governance and should be checked before deployment.
